entity.description: Clean is really clean when you choose sustainable ingredients. Your laundry is done without synthetic perfumes, dyes and microplastics. For example, Seepje uses the skin of the Sapindus fruit from the Himalayas, which contains a natural soap! Better for the environment and everyone involved.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: This Soaply 99.8% natural Universal laundry detergent with Dazzling Jasmine scent offers the most powerful cleaning for all your laundry. So together, well teach even the most stubborn stains a lesson. Are you ready for it! 99.8% ingredients of natural origin Concentrated formula Cleans even at 20 degrees C Bottle is made of Dutch recycled plastic (97%) and is recyclable Certified by Ecocert and Vegan Society

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool dry place

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

metaData.Key Information: your clothes will thank you. you love coffee, red wine and chocolate milk shakes. just not on your clothes. the naturally derived cleaning power in this recyclable bottle fights tough dirt + stains. so your whites stay white and your colors stay bright. now you can indulge in your favorite foods without having to worry about your wardrobe. what's that smell? you know the saying "spring is in the air"? It means the birds are chirping, the flowers are blooming, the sky is blue and everything smells so fresh and lovely. that's pretty much what happens when you open this bottle. except maybe for the chirping birds. suitable for front and top load washers. 2/3 capful = medium load. 1 capful = large load.<
